channel.title: ClosedGL's Notes
channel.description: Short messages that are too short to make into a blog post

item.title: Whoa, do you realize you're wanting...
item.description: Whoa, do you realize you're wanting to kill yourself over some pixels on a computer screen?

item.title: Could just be because it's summer
item.description: Could just be because it's summer

item.title: My laptop is heating up again just...
item.description: My laptop is heating up again just three months after repasting, maybe i suck at applying thermal paste?

item.title: Is there any practical use for...
item.description: Is there any practical use for HDMI and DisplayPort having Ethernet?

item.title: I was in such a wild state just now...
item.description: I was in such a wild state just now, thinking about quitting coffee. I have a bunch of tea, I'll try drinking that instead, and see if i can push through the withdrawal symptoms. I feel like I will still be energetic without coffee, and it will feel much better.

item.title: It took me ONE AND A HALF YEARS...
item.description: It took me ONE AND A HALF YEARS to figure out that too much caffeine was the source of my health issues!!! AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA guess ill try quitting for realsies

item.title: My energy throughout the day...
item.description: My energy throughout the day seems to be a fine mixture of neurodivergent hyperactivity and caffeine.

item.title: Getting bored of Go Vacation now...
item.description: Getting bored of Go Vacation now, I've experienced most of what it has to offer. I will still definitely revisit it with my modding ideas if the source is ever released.

item.title: MY LAPTOP'S AUDIO IS BACK!!!!!!
item.description: MY LAPTOP'S AUDIO IS BACK!!!!!! Here is the first thing i listened to

item.title: Apparently when I was maybe 11..
item.description: Apparently when I was maybe 11 or something, I drew something involving a "modem bonfire". I don't want to know the context.

item.title: What a shame that repair...
item.description: What a shame that repair and maintainence are the norm with cars, but not computers. All the major companies have made computer repair too much of a walled garden in the name of planned obsolescence.

item.title: sprintf(objective, "Try to get...
item.description: sprintf(objective, "Try to get all the silver keys!\nOnly %d left to go!", im_addicted_to_go_vacation);

item.title: I'm a walking duck on the net...
item.description: I'm a walking duck on the net. Maybe I should set up the sanctuary network I've been thinking of.

item.title: I thought about calling these notes...
item.description: I thought about calling these notes "noises", but that may have been a bit obnoxious.

item.title: Government tyranny is scary...
item.description: Government tyranny is scary, and it's raining bullets around here. I had fun burning an American flag today.
